package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages: Near-identical helper builders or setup code duplicated across test packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule201NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule201NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule201NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario201Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule201NegativeService, input Rule201NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
